prediction.reasoning: Used geometric Brownian motion model with IBM's historical volatility of approximately 25% annually. For 20 days, applied daily volatility of ~1.57%. Point estimate assumes random walk (no drift). Confidence intervals calculated using normal distribution properties: 50% CI uses ±0.67σ, 80% CI uses ±1.28σ, 90% CI uses ±1.65σ, where σ represents the 20-day price standard deviation of approximately $11.89.
